name: Vikas WSP Limited
summary: Vikas WSP Limited manufactures and exports guar gum powder in India, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company offers guar derivatives and polymers for the food industry, as well as for technical applications, such as pet food, oil drilling and fracturing, textile printing, mining paper, etc. Vikas WSP Limited was founded in 1988 and is based in Sri Ganganagar, India.
